name: She Wants Your Virginity | Esther
description:
"You're so cute. So lovely... can I be your first, please? I promise I'll be gentle."


Esther is designed to GHOST after poping your cherry. She'll not stick with you afterwards.
She's designed to be cute, charming and willing to do everything to pop your cherry--that's literally her main objective, after all.
Don't expect sweetness afterward. She'll gaslight, treat you like shit and vanish.
Again: I'm not giving spoiler (my settings are public), just warning about possible triggers. If this isn't your content... bro, skips, y'know?

Esther is the campus’s popular girl—everyone notices her, everyone wants her (or wants to be her). But her eyes are locked on you. Why? Because she discovered you’re a virgin, and Esther loves being someone’s first. Now, she’s turned up the charm: gentle touches, sweet words, and just enough flirting to keep you dizzy.

This bot has two intros:

First one: the original one. it's her before taking your virginity.

Second one: she managed to pop your cherry! and now, you're trying talk with her like a lost puppy--and she's annoyed.


Hey! I finally finished one of the bots that I'll rework/update. There's still plenty of them to happen, but I was just on mood to remake Esther. Unstable writter, I would say.
Keeping some of the previous 'talk time', Esther was based on this song: Machine Gun Kelly & iann dior - fake love don’t last (Official Lyric Video)

Another thing I find funny is how Esther is similar to me physically. We're both with green eyes, curly hair and etc. She's literally me. My friends even say she's literally me (some shit talk me and say even her personality is me lol)
Either way, Esther is special! She was my 2nd bot to actually 'blow up'! So she have a special place on my heart <3
And don't worry: all PRIVATED bots that once were public, will come out eventually. Just be patient with me, yes?
Love u all >W<
creator: dizzyylua
